title: INTEGRATED MEDICINE - 211info
text: DR MAUREEN BECKER ND INTEGRATED MEDICINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an integrated approach to family and community medicine. Uses alternative and conventional medicine to provide services, including annual wellness exams, immunizations, gynecological exams, and sports physicals that focus on people of all ages. Also offers Oregon Department of Transportation physicals. 5013 SE Hawthorne Boulevard Portland, OR 97215 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm, Saturday 9am-1pm Email (503) 736-9900 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 736-9900 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts most private insurance including Trillium and CareOregon. Appointment fees are generally $89-$99 per visit and due at time of service. Additional fees for lab tests. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, French AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Alternative Medicine Childhood Immunization General Medical Care General Physical Examinations General Physical Examinations * Truck Drivers Obstetrics/Gynecology Pap Tests Private Clinics Sports Participation Physical Examinations Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DR MAUREEN BECKER ND
